def positive_flask_no_streaming_for_large_response():
    rule_id = "flask_no_streaming_for_large_response"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flask views build large in-memory responses where generator or streaming responses would fit better."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
